title: gymnadenia conopsea proles densiflora
intro: Gymnadenia conopsea proles densiflora, also known as the dense-flowered summer resurge, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gymnadenia conopsea proles densiflora include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and relieving digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
